properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Like a deer that pants for water I am thirsty for You, Lord And in my heart there is a longing I still believe there's more So open up the heavens And let Your Spirit fall like rain Wash me in Your presence Refresh my life again

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: A hungry heart is what I bring To the table of my King For there my soul is satisfied With all the goodness He provides Oh, all that I need is there by faith The table is set with mercy and grace So I come with a hungry heart

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: As I come into His presence I am made complete Feasting at His table And sitting at His feet Then I will run and not grow weary I will walk and never faint I will rise on wings like eagles For the Lord will be my strength

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Just as I am without one plea But that Thy blood was shed for me And as you bid me come to thee Oh Lamb of God, I come

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: A hungry heart is what I bring To the table of my King For there my soul is satisfied With all the goodness He provides Oh, all that I need is there by faith The table is set with mercy and grace So I come with a hungry heart So I come with a hungry heart
